This weeks specials are:

(June 5th through June 18th)

Garlic Soup

A chicken broth based soup with the wonderful flavor of fresh garlic. Served with egg, croutons, fresh cheese, and serrano chiles.

(gluten friendly without the crutons)

cup $3.95/ bowl $6.95

Cochinita Pibil

One of the representative dishes of the Yucatan Peninsula with its origins in the Mayan culture. It is pork marinated overnight in citrus juices, achiote, and spices that is then wrapped in banana leaves and baked slowly until very tender. We serve it with white rice, black beans, and pickled red onion in the traditional style.

(gluten friendly)

$19.75

Tacos de Carnitas

Three tacos of traditional slow cooked pork on corn tortillas topped with pickled red onion and cilantro. (gluten friendly)

$14.95

Baja Fish Tacos

Three tacos of battered cod with a chipotle aioli and topped with red and green cabbage and a sprinkling of queso fresco, Baja California style. Served with rice and beans.

$19.95
